use_cases: Transform text into interactive particle systems for hero sections
Create engaging typography animations on portfolio and creative websites
Add mouse-reactive visual effects to landing pages
Implement text-based particle effects for SaaS product showcases
ai_summary: An interactive canvas-based text particle animation that transforms text into responsive particle systems. Particles react to mouse movement with physics-based motion, creating dynamic visual effects suitable for hero sections, landing pages, and creative portfolios. Configurable via props for font, color, size, density, and background.
